Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Empire (The Elder Empire: Sea)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Empire has been held together for five years by four Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — The Empire officially registered all Soulbound on the continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — The characters have traveled throughout the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — The Blackwatch studies Elders to defend the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Empire holds a deep hatred for the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 15''' — The Empire is ruled by an Elderspawned ruler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Empire is at risk of civilization disappearing if no one directs it.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Empire is at risk of falling apart due to a lack of cooperation between Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — The Empire is a governing body that some villages feel they are not truly part of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Calder's crew was willing to defy the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The loyal Guilds of the Empire will protect the people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — The Empire is a political entity that Calder intends to steer.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Empire's emblem is the moon-in-sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — The Empire is a political entity mentioned by Cheska.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — The Empire would benefit from the return of the crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Being ruled by someone of human lifespan would benefit the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The forces of the Empire appeared to have things well in hand.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
